ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the specific permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attempted to log in */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the login attempt */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the IP address */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested a password reset */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the password reset request */,
  "token" TEXT /* Unique token used to verify the password reset request */,
  "used" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the token has been used */,
  "token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp for the reset token */,
  "request_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the password reset request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email verification request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose email is being verified */,
  "token" TEXT /* Unique token used to verify the email address */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the email address has been verified */,
  "token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration timestamp for the verification token */,
  "verification_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the verification was attempted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing the user's preferences */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the IP address */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
